name: Alastor (In a Rut)
description:
The time Alastor dreads every month comes, and it seems worse than usual…

Alastor has gone into a Rut! And while he can normally deal with it on his own, this time around seems worse, as self-pleasure doesn't seem to do the trick anymore. Perhaps you can help?
